title: Bright Ideas Pipe Cleaners - Glitter Tinsel PK100 Long Assorted 30cm x 6mm, Multi Colour Pipe Cleaners, Arts & Craft, Green, Blue, Red, Gold, Silver Bright Tinsel Cleaners for Crafting. BI0007.
features: Bright Ideas 100 assorted long Tinsel pipe cleaners’ chenille stems are supplied flat and then supplied in a clear reusable polybag for extra protection from dust and moisture – we have 8 bright and colourful assorted packs available in the range

Each bright and colourful pipe cleaners’ chenille stems and finished in a soft fabric with a steel rod through the middle making it bendable and flexible, easy to bend, twist and wrap to most shapes and measures approx. 300mm long and 6mm in diameter

Every pack of 100 pipe cleaners’ chenille stems contains 20 of each of the following 5 colours, Gold, Silver, Red, Green and Blue – Please note that product colour may slightly vary due to photographic lighting sourcing
Pipe cleaners are an excellent way to have crafting fun and an amazing way for parents to spend quality time with their children. A great addition to any crafters Art and crafts supplier’s box

Perfect for classroom crafting and most arts and crafts, colourful pipe cleaners’ chenille stems will be a great addition to your arts & crafts supplies. Ideal for all DIY projects like wrapping shapes, flower making, fluffy animal characters or any fun kids groups at home or school
description: From the manufacturer Bright Ideas Crafts - Arts and Crafts Supplier Our Story Bright Ideas is a well-established and successful arts and crafts supplier founded in 1995 in Suffolk, England. We specialise in devising and sourcing great quality arts and crafts products globally for sale in the craft and educational market. We have an extensive range of Arts and Crafts products and our product range is constantly growing. Products are available at affordable prices across our complete range with exciting items available for: Arts & Craft Christmas Education - particularly Primary Education Products in our range include: Border Rolls - available in a range of single colours which also include Gold and Silver Metallic. Also available some super-value multi-packs with assorted colours and in varying pack sizes. Cellophane - single colour rolls in 6 colours including clear and printed cello bags for Christmas and Easter festivities. Tissue and Crepe Paper - tissue paper available on a handy roll in individual colours or as an assorted coloured paper roll. Our Crepe Paper is available in packs of 10 folded sheets - again in assorted individual colour packs or multi-packs of 12 assorted colours. Book Covers and Book Covering Self-Adhesive Film - a range of sizes making them perfect for schools and libraries Arts and Crafts essentials ..... Barrel and Alphabet Beads, Wiggle Eyes, Stems, Buttons, Pom Poms, Jewels, Confetti Sparkles, Glitter, Ribbons, Felt and so much more including some assorted Arts and Crafts Kits. Chalk - pavement chalk, chalk eggs, blackboard chalk and a range of Oil and Soft Pastel chalks. Paper products including metallic paper and card, fluorescent paper, a lovely Rainbow range with paper, card, crepe and tissue and A4 Black card to name a few Calendar Tabs and Calendar Blanks Naturals Range - choose from Acorns, Pine Cones, Branch Off-cuts and Willow Branches. Chenille Stems / Pipe cleaner Range Our Chenille Stems or Pipe Cleaners are made from a soft polyester and have an iron steel rod running up the middle, which is flexible for easy bending into any shape, soft durable and strong for your art craft needs Soft and easy to use and good for sticking with glue Available in assorted colours Available in pack sizes from 50 to 1000 pieces Packs range in colour and styles from Normal, Tinsel, Long, Stripy and extra wide Our range of Chenille Stems or Pipe Cleaners are 300mm and 150mm in length with the diameter ranging from 5 – 15mm Supplied in a reusable polybag with black and white or coloured sticky product label attached Crafting Must Have Our range of Chenille Stems or Pipe Cleaners have many art and craft uses such as decorating many items including costumes, shoes, clothes, bags, scrapbooks, jewellery, greeting cards, arts, craft projects and collages or anything else you can think of. Let your imagination run wild, guaranteed to brighten up any classroom display or school collage. These pipe cleaners can be easily folded, cut and affixed easily with glue and many more craft items and accessories. With our wide range of bright assorted colours make something ordinary that extra bit more special for any craft party, occasion or project. Curly Chenille Stems / Pipe cleaner Range Our Curly Chenille Stems or Pipe Cleaners are made from a polyester and have an iron steel rod running up the middle, which is flexible for easy bending into any shape, durable and strong for your art craft needs Easy to use and good for sticking with glue Available in assorted colours or Iridescent colour Available in pack's of 50 pieces Curly Chenille Stems or Pipe Cleaners are 250mm in length with the diameter of 14mm Supplied in a reusable polybag with coloured sticky product label attached Striped Assorted Extra Wide Extra Wide Tinsel Stems Tinsel Stems Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 39 4.4 out of 5 stars 186 4.3 out of 5 stars 9 — 4.5 out of 5 stars 189 4.5 out of 5 stars 189 Price £3.99 £ 3 . 99 — no data £3.99 £ 3 . 99 £3.99 £ 3 . 99 £3.49 £ 3 . 49 — no data Pack Size 100 100 50 50 100 100 Colours 10 Assorted Stripe Blue, Green, Red, White and Yellow Light Blue, Green, Lilac, Red and Yellow Black, Light Brown, Orange, White and Yellow Metallic Gold, Silver, Red, Green and Blue Metallic Gold and Silver Material Polyester and Iron Steel Polyester and Iron Steel Polyester and Iron Steel Polyester and Iron Steel Polyester and Iron Steel Polyester and Iron Steel Stem Size 300mm x 6mm 300mm x 6mm 300mm x 15mm 300mm x 15mm 300mm x 6mm 300mm x 6mm Chenille Pipe Cleaner Stems 150mm Soft and easy to use and good for sticking with glue Available in 3 pack sizes 100, 250 and 1000 pieces Each assorted pack has the following colours, Yellow, Blue, Red, White, Green, Brown, Orange, Pink, Light Blue and Black Chenille Stems or Pipe Cleaners are 150mm in length and 4mm diameter
